steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content:
The exponent is $$\frac{x}{12}$$, so one year means $$x=12$$ months. Then
$$(0.42)^{\frac{12}{12}}=0.42$$
After one year, the equipment is worth $42\%$ of its previous value.

steps.title: Convert to percent decrease
steps.content: If $42\%$ of the value remains, the percent decrease is $$100\%-42\%=58\%$$ So $$p=58$$ The answer is D.
